hub_ot.title: ICS / Power Grid
hub_ot.text: Power plants, city lights, and substations show disruption. Machine roles are critical; inspect process files and operator notes safely.

ot_hmi.title: Turbine HMI
ot_hmi.text: Role: plant operator interface. Turbine speed setpoints drifted and caused light flicker alarms in multiple districts.

options.label: Compare HMI config snapshots and operator logs
options.effectText: Detected unauthorized setpoint changes tied to malware operator activity.

options.label: Push emergency write without validation
options.effectText: Emergency write reduced visibility and increased process instability risk.

ot_hist.title: Grid Historian
ot_hist.text: Role: historian for generation, load, and breaker state. Trend gaps indicate manipulation during peak load.

options.label: Inspect historian records and recover missing telemetry
options.effectText: Recovered tampered OT trend points and linked to ransomware tasking.

ot_gate.title: Substation Gateway
ot_gate.text: Role: routes control traffic between OT enclaves. Blocking routing service here will collapse this segment.

options.label: Audit firewall policy and keep routing alive
options.effectText: Gateway policy cleaned while segment remained online.

options.label: Disable routing service
options.effectText: Substation communication collapsed after routing shutdown.
